original_image_tags: The document is a scanned page showing the reverse side of a typed memorandum. The main body of text from the other side of the page is visible through the paper as a faint mirror image (bleed-through). Two binder holes are present at the top. A blue "RECEIVED" stamp is in the lower right corner.

elements.description: Back of a typed document with reversed, faint text visible through the paper. Includes a blue ink stamp in the bottom right corner with legible text: 'RECEIVED ATOMIC ENERGY LIAISON SECTION U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE F.B.I. Jun 8 4 50 PM '49'.

judge.reason: Both agree on the main visual content (back of typed document with bleed-through text and blue RECEIVED stamp), but Description B adds specific verbatim text from the stamp that Description A omits without contradiction.
